---
title: "Python Fundamentals"
subtitle: "From Zero to Data Hero"
layout: full
listing:
  contents: 
    - "01basics1.qmd"
    - "02basics2.qmd"
    - "03basics3.qmd"
    - "04basics4.qmd"
    - "05pandas1.qmd"
    - "06pandas2.qmd"
    - "07Visualisations.qmd"
    - "08WrapUp_Refresher.qmd"
    - "09QA_SampleExam.qmd"
  type: grid           # Creates clean cards for each chapter
  sort: "filename"     # Sorts by 01, 02...
  categories: false
---

Welcome to the STADS Python course! This course is divided into logical stages.
Choose a chapter below to get started.
